{{Quote|The transport is docked at B-2.|[[Nuris Blaht]]|<ref name="BOB" />}}
'''B-2''' was a [[Hangar/Legends|landing platform]] situated in the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Joventusek]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Caarimon]].<ref name="BOB" /> Circa [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]],<ref name="date">The ''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' states that the [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|Living Force]] campaign is set one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], an event that is dated to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. As the Living Force adventure ''[[Below the Belt: Philology|Philology]]'' [[Cularin's disappearance|moved]] the campaign forward ten years to the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], ''[[Metatheran Caution: Belly of the Beaast|Belly of the Beaast]]'' can therefore be dated to circa [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]].</ref> the [[Believers]] [[Sith cult/Legends|Sith cult]] docked a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] laden with an [[anti-Caarite virus]] in the bay. The [[Metatheran Cartel]] scanned the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] and, detecting the presence of a hazardous substance, confiscated the viral cargo.<ref name="BOB" />
